overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a rainy futuristic urban plaza in Night City. The scene features towering skyscrapers with digital billboards, palm trees, and cyberpunk architecture. The player ascends stairs, explores elevated walkways, and views a massive arch structure before returning to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza entrance with grand staircase

events.description: begins ascending the wide concrete stairs toward the elevated plaza
reaches the top of the stairs and steps onto the wooden deck plaza

agents.ego_description: walking forward and climbing a wide set of concrete stairs to reach an elevated pedestrian plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat walking up the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with multiple steps leading up to the plaza level
large illuminated advertisement screen showing animated content on the building facade
cluster of garbage bags and debris piled along the right side railing
transparent glass safety barrier with metal posts along the right side
tall palm trees visible above the stairway against the building backdrop

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at ground level in a rainy futuristic city plaza. The player approaches and climbs a wide concrete staircase, following a pedestrian in a brown coat. Digital billboards and palm trees are visible above, while trash bags line the right side. The camera ascends steadily to reach the elevated wooden deck.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with digital advertising displays

events.description: turns right to explore the perimeter of the plaza
passes multiple large digital billboards including advertisements for FERVID and BUDGET ARMS

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet wooden plaza deck, turning right to follow the perimeter path past various advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on the stairs to the right side of the path

entered.detail: wet wooden plank flooring of the elevated pedestrian area with rain droplets visible
large purple-framed digital advertisement display showing animated content
rectangular concrete structure with green covering and plants
additional stairway leading to an upper level on the right side

segments.scene_description: Having reached the elevated plaza, the player explores the wooden deck area. The scene features multiple large digital billboards with purple frames advertising various products. A pedestrian sits on stairs to the right. The player moves past concrete planters and glass railings, heading toward a secondary stairway while rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper walkway with monumental architecture view

events.description: ascends secondary stairway to reach the upper walkway level
camera tilts upward to reveal the massive arch structure connecting skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: climbing to an upper walkway and pausing to look up at a monumental arch structure between buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending the stairs toward the player

entered.detail: massive futuristic archway connecting two skyscrapers with green neon signage at the top
curved elevated roadway structure with orange lighting visible in the distance
smooth concrete pedestrian path at the upper level between buildings

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a secondary stairway to an upper concrete walkway. From this vantage point, the camera pans up to reveal a massive futuristic arch structure spanning between skyscrapers, featuring green neon signage. An elevated highway curves in the background. The player encounters a pedestrian coming down the stairs while exploring this upper level.

events.description: descends stairs back to the main plaza level
approaches the purple-lit commercial kiosk in the plaza center

agents.ego_description: descending back to the main plaza level and walking toward a neon-lit commercial kiosk area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a purple umbrella walking across the wet plaza

entered.detail: small commercial booth with bright purple neon lighting and glass display cases
transparent rectangular display container on the plaza ground near the kiosk

segments.scene_description: The player descends from the upper walkway back to the wooden plaza level. The scene opens up to reveal a commercial area featuring a distinctive kiosk with bright purple neon lighting. The player passes glass display cases and walks toward the kiosk while a pedestrian with a purple umbrella crosses the wet plaza. Digital billboards and palm trees frame the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rainy street-level plaza up through elevated walkways and back down into a neon-lit commercial hub. It begins at ground level, ascending a wide concrete staircase past trash bags and palm trees while following a pedestrian in a brown coat. As the camera reaches an elevated wooden deck, the environment opens up to reveal large purple-framed digital billboards and glass railings under a steady rainfall. The scene then shifts upward via a secondary stairway to a high concrete walkway, where the camera pans up to reveal a massive futuristic arch with green neon signage spanning between skyscrapers and a curving highway. Finally, the camera descends back to the wooden plaza level, moving toward a bright purple neon kiosk as a pedestrian with a purple umbrella crosses the wet pavement.
